abstract: Production React Native / Expo architecture. Feature-based layering with clean separation between data (repositories + Zod models), domain (React Query, Zustand), and presentation (screens + hooks). Covers: RepositoryBase with 3-tier caching (MMKV, expo-secure-store, RQ in-memory), typed ServiceLocator DI, useDataScreen + useOperation hooks, global OverlayManager via Zustand, Expo Router dual-group navigation, axios interceptor chain with token-refresh queuing, structured error hierarchy, and RNTL testing patterns.
